title: Claude Fable 5 + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates a faceless YouTube channel system combining Claude Code (Fable 5), Higsfield CLI for automated editing, and Auphonic for audio processing. The pipeline deconstructs successful channels, generates scripts via Claude, records voice-over, and uses Claude to automatically edit and stitch videos together at roughly two dollars per video.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through a faceless YouTube production pipeline built around Claude Code (Fable 5), the Higsfield CLI for automated editing, and Auphonic for audio processing. The system deconstructs successful channels, generates scripts with Claude, records voice-over, and uses Claude to edit and stitch the final videos. The stated cost is roughly two dollars per video, with the channel framed as a path to monthly revenue.
